intro_highlights.text: Recent studies tackle this problem by developing re-weighting and re-sampling methods, that utilise the class frequencies of the dataset.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: However, these techniques focus solely on the frequency statistics and ignore the distribution of the classes in image space, missing important information.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: In contrast to them, we propose FRActal CALibration (FRACAL): a novel post-calibration method for long-tailed object detection.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 引言通常先定义任务场景与应用价值。
中段会指出现有方法在复杂场景下的失败模式。
末段给出方法主线与贡献列表。
